title: Augustine, Sermon 2
description: Sermon 2 of Augustine of Hippo, preached at his cathedral.
introduction: Sermon 2 of Augustine of Hippo, preached at his cathedral.

translation.text: Augustine's Sermon 2: 'Brothers and sisters, we are pilgrims in this world. Our true home is in heaven. Let us not love the things that pass, but the things that endure forever.'
